basics.name: Emanuele Frasca
basics.label: Computer Engineer specializing in AI and Robotics
basics.summary: I am interested in research and development of Explainable AI, artificial intelligence systems capable of explaining their own decisions, to enhance transparency and user trust in the decision-making process.

work.name: MAD Industrial Team
highlights: Assisted in the management and maintenance of the used IT systems, ensuring efficient operation.
Gained practical skills in configuring and using Apache servers in a Linux environment.
Developed skills in communicating responsibly and seriously with clients in a professional context.

work.name: Autoscuola Nautica Picarazzi
highlights: Configured the driving school's IT system, implementing a computerized license quiz system.
Trained the driving school's team on distance learning, allowing working clients to attend classes.
Implemented a road simulator to give students a safe first approach to driving experience.

work.name: Freelancer
highlights: Resolved issues on CNC company machinery bringing company production back to normal.
Built websites for clients ranging from driving schools, non-profits, hotels and insurance companies.
Tutored computer science, mathematics, and physics to students at university and high school levels.

projects.name: Mathematical Expression Recognizer and Solver Using AI
highlights: Developed a convolutional ML model using Tensorflow for recognizing mathematical expressions.
Implemented a Computer Vision algorithm for atomic segmentation of expression elements.
Conducted detailed research on model optimization by implementing k-fold cross-validation.

projects.name: Semantic Segmentation of Drone Images Using Deep Learning
highlights: Implemented a series of deep learning models for segmentation of images captured by drones.
Utilized data augmentation to enhance model robustness and minimize overfitting.
Implemented a training and testing pipeline to evaluate and compare model performance.
